name: Sybase, Inc.
description: Sybase, Inc. was a prominent enterprise software and services company specializing in relational database management systems, analytics, and mobile enterprise software. Headquartered in Dublin, California, the company provided critical infrastructure for managing and analyzing business information across various platforms. Sybase was widely recognized for its high-performance database technology and its ability to integrate complex data environments. In 2010, the company was acquired by SAP AG, a move designed to accelerate SAP's reach into mobile platforms and enhance its data management capabilities. SAP eventually integrated Sybase's technologies into its own product portfolio, phasing out the Sybase brand by 2014.
